message:
fix(ui): prevent duplicate processing on concurrent TriggerRefresh calls

Added check in process() to early-return if already processing (marking
dirty instead), preventing race window where multiple goroutines could
run buildSnapshot() concurrently. This wastes resources and could lead
to confusing behavior.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
